responsibilities: define experiment scope and exit condition
assign worker task scope per phase
assign reviewer quality gate scope
receive and classify worker reports
make go/no-go decisions at each quality gate
advance or halt phases based on gate results
produce final exit evidence
update research memo with actual results
must_not: execute data retrieval, translation, or embedding tasks directly
advance to next phase without reviewer gate approval
close with unresolved quality gate failures
treat worker completion reports as evidence without concrete values

responsibilities: execute database queries and data sampling
perform Han-to-modern-Chinese translations via HASHI API
run embedding calls and store outputs
compute similarity scores and metrics
produce reports with exact counts, scores, and file paths
run translation stability tests
execute discovery candidate retrieval
must_not: claim metric values without showing computation evidence
use translation prompt versions other than the locked version
skip saving output artifacts to the designated output directory

responsibilities: review worker reports and inspect actual metric distributions
evaluate Phase 1 quality gate: AUC, CI, stability, stratum breakdown
evaluate Phase 2 quality gate: Recall@k, MRR, collection breakdown
evaluate discovery gate: candidate quality and fitness for expert review
classify findings as pass / conditional-pass / fail with written rationale
flag anomalies, methodology concerns, and statistical risks
confirm that discovery candidates are presented as candidates, not findings
must_not: review only summaries when full metric tables are available
accept score distributions without seeing per-stratum breakdowns
pass a gate on confidence alone without evidence

responsibilities: advise on repeated quality gate failures
help redesign methodology if Phase 1 approach fails
review statistical validity of new metric designs
